class.name: PacketPeerExtension
class.brief_description: Extension class to [PacketPeer] for implementing custom in GDExtension or C++.
class.description: This class provides an interface which extends [PacketPeer] for use with GDExtension or custom C++ classes, which allows for the implementation of a custom packet-based protocol, while retaining access to all the high level API found in [PacketPeer]. To create a custom packet peer, override [method _get_packet] and [method _put_packet] to handle raw packet I/O, and override [method _get_available_packet_count] and [method _get_max_packet_size] to report the state of your underlying buffer or connection. [b]Note:[/b] When exporting to Android, make sure to enable the [code]INTERNET[/code] permission in the Android export preset before exporting the project or using one-click deploy. Otherwise, network communication of any kind will be blocked by Android.

method.name: _get_available_packet_count
method.description: Returns the number of packets currently available to read in the ring (receive) buffer. Backing implementation of [method PacketPeer.get_available_packet_count].

method.name: _get_max_packet_size
method.description: Returns the maximum number of bytes in a single packet. Backing implementation of [method PacketPeer.get_packet] (size constraint).

method.name: _get_packet
method.description: Returns the next available raw packet. Sets [param r_buffer] to point to the packet's data and sets [param r_buffer_size] to the byte length of that data. The buffer must remain valid until the next call to [method _get_packet] or [method _put_packet]. Return [constant OK] on success, or an appropriate [enum Error] code on failure. The returned error can later be queried via [method PacketPeer.get_packet_error]. Backing implementation of [method PacketPeer.get_packet].

method.name: _put_packet
method.description: Sends a raw packet. [param buffer] points to the data to send and [param buffer_size] is the number of bytes to transmit. Backing implementation of [method PacketPeer.put_packet].
